mapper.select: SELECT c.*, CASE WHEN uc.id IS NOT NULL THEN true ELSE false END AS received FROM coupons c LEFT JOIN user_coupons uc ON c.id = uc.coupon_id AND uc.user_id = #{userId} AND uc.deleted_at IS NULL WHERE c.status = 1 AND c.deleted_at IS NULL AND c.start_time <= NOW() AND c.end_time >= NOW() AND c.received_count < c.total_count ORDER BY c.created_at DESC

SELECT c.id AS couponId, c.name AS couponName, c.total_count AS totalCount, c.received_count AS receivedCount, c.used_count AS usedCount, ROUND(c.used_count * 100.0 / NULLIF(c.received_count, 0), 2) AS usageRate FROM coupons c WHERE c.id = #{couponId} AND c.deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT c.* FROM coupons c INNER JOIN user_coupons uc ON c.id = uc.coupon_id AND uc.status = 0 AND uc.deleted_at IS NULL WHERE uc.user_id = #{userId} AND c.status = 1 AND c.deleted_at IS NULL AND c.start_time <= NOW() AND c.end_time >= NOW() AND c.min_amount <= #{orderAmount} ORDER BY c.discount_value DESC
